title: Solar Client
description: A modpack made for comfort, style, and FPS
body:
This Modpack is a client made for FPS, comfort, and style. it is mostly customizable, and in cludes shaders, (iris), animated texture packs, particile features, the Essential mod, and much more!

this is just a modpack that i have been tinkering with, meant to be kind of a 1.21.1 version of Astro client, which was a replacment of Lunar Client, one of the most used (and overated) Clients.

please note that the lower resalution screen shots were takin during movement, and that is why the are so low res.

thank you for downloading the modpack!

*yes i am planning to update this modpack
